diagrams.title: Fidelity Spectrum
diagrams.description: Shows the progression from low-fidelity to high-fidelity prototypes with examples
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the continuum of prototype fidelity levels and when to use each

diagrams.title: Prototype Decision Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision tree for selecting appropriate fidelity level based on project needs
elements: Outcome nodes: Use Low-fi, Use Medium-fi, Use High-fi
diagrams.purpose: Guiding designers in choosing the right fidelity level for their current objectives

diagrams.title: Cost vs Benefit Analysis
diagrams.description: Comparison chart showing tradeoffs between fidelity levels
elements: Bars showing: Time investment, Effort required, Feedback quality, Stakeholder understanding
Trend lines showing increasing costs and benefits
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the investment-return relationship for different fidelity levels

diagrams.title: Three Types of Fidelity
diagrams.description: Venn diagram showing visual, functional, and content fidelity as overlapping aspects
elements: Center: High-fidelity prototype combines all three
Labels: Low-fi lacks one or more elements
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that fidelity is multidimensional and high-fi prototypes require all three types
